# autolearn skip list — questions parrot0 already answers correctly
# One exact question per line. Generated by autolearn.py (already-capable verdicts).
# The interviewer MUST NOT ask these questions again; if it does, they are silently
# discarded and a new question is generated.
How do you say "Good morning" in Spanish?
I have cities but no houses, forests but no trees, and water but no fish. What am I?
I'm tall when I'm young, and I'm short when I'm old. What am I?
In what year did World War II end?
I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body, but I come alive with the wind. What am I?
I speak without a mouth and hear without ears. I have no body, but I come alive with wind. What am I?
Under the glowing moon so bright,
What color do you get when you mix blue and yellow paint together?
What color do you get when you mix blue and yellow together?

What is the capital city of Australia?
